name: knowhow_search
description_zh: 在 KnowHow 知识库中搜索项目案例、专家资料、合同文档等知识内容。支持自然语言检索和元数据过滤。
description: Search the KnowHow knowledge base for project cases, expert profiles, contracts, and other knowledge. Supports semantic search with metadata filtering by tags, industry, products, author, quality, node_path etc. Use this when the user asks about any internal knowledge, cases, experts, or documents. For browsing without a query, pass empty query string for pure metadata filtering.

query.description: Natural language search query. Use empty string for pure metadata filtering without semantic search.

business_domain.description: Business domain: 'project' for project cases, 'contract' for contracts. Default: 'project'.

rerank_enable.description: Whether to enable rerank refinement. Default: true.

top_k.description: Number of results to return (1-500). Default: 20.

score_threshold.description: Score threshold - results below this are filtered out.

vector_weight.description: Vector weight for Weaviate hybrid search (0-1). Higher = more vector similarity.

rerank_blend_weight.description: Vector score weight in final result (0-1). Only effective when rerank enabled. Default: 0.5.

filter_tags.description: Filter by tags (资料类型/业务维度/业务系统/终端/项目需求场景). JSON string array.

filter_products.description: Filter by product line. Use 'containsAny' operator.

filter_author.description: Filter by author name. Use 'equals' operator.

filter_quality.description: Filter by content quality. Use 'equals' operator.

filter_customer.description: Filter by customer name. Use 'equals' operator.

filter_node_path.description: Filter by folder path. Use 'containsAny' operator.
